summary: Full backend + frontend testing for WISE² Sound Labs Command Center. All 18 backend tests pass (auth, dashboard aggregate, chat, feed like, notifications, search). All 13 sidebar routes render without errors. Login → /live redirect, elapsed timer ticks, live chat POST persists, feed likes increment, live studio controls (unmute toggle, watch, reminder) work, notif/user dropdowns open, logout returns to /login, Discord button has correct external href with target=_blank.

issues: Bell and Mail icons use non-standard Tailwind classes 'w-4.5 h-4.5' which do not resolve (Tailwind default has no 4.5 scale). Icons still render at fallback size but should use w-4 or w-5 for consistency.

action_items: OPTIONAL polish: replace 'w-4.5 h-4.5' with 'w-4 h-4' or 'w-5 h-5' on Bell/Mail icons in Header.js.

OPTIONAL: verify deep interactivity on inner sidebar pages (BrandDNA sliders, AnthemCreator add/remove sections, RecordingRoom timer, MixingConsole faders, Mastering render, Challenges join, Settings toggles) — pages load without crashes but deep flows were not exhaustively exercised by this run.
critical_code_review_comments: Header.js outside-click handler uses `mousedown` on document to close dropdowns; works with real user mousedown-then-click but may misbehave under some synthetic events (Playwright force=True). Consider using 'click' event instead of 'mousedown' for closing to avoid closing before button's onClick executes.

server.py line 267: `user.get('role') == 'Administrator' and 'ADMIN' or None` uses the short-circuit and/or idiom which is subtly buggy in general Python (fails if middle value is falsy). Works here but prefer explicit ternary: `'ADMIN' if user.get('role') == 'Administrator' else None`.
server.py: CORS uses allow_origins=['*'] which is fine for MVP but should be restricted for production.
Frontend uses only front-end route protection; API endpoints correctly enforce JWT via Depends(get_current_user).
test_credentials: Admin dwise@wise2.net / Glock19! (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md) — login verified working.
seed_data_creation: None; used existing seeded chat/projects/feed/leaderboard/notifications. Test posted one chat message ('TEST_ui_chat_message' + 'TEST_chat_message_from_pytest') and liked one feed post; these are additive and safe.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite at /app/backend/tests/test_backend.py (pytest). Run: `cd /app && python -m pytest backend/tests/test_backend.py -v`. Frontend flows covered: login (valid+invalid), dashboard rendering (all panels), live-studio timer + controls, chat send, feed like, notif dropdown, user dropdown + logout, sidebar navigation to all 13 pages, Discord external link href. Inner sidebar pages (BrandDNA/AnthemCreator/RecordingRoom/etc.) load without JS errors but their internal interactive controls (sliders/faders/record timer) were not deeply exercised — a good next-iteration target.
rca of the issue: N/A — no blocking issues found. All requested features work as specified.
